description_long: This is a rectangular carton of Organic Valley Half & Half, featuring a predominantly purple and white color scheme with green and blue landscape imagery. The front panel displays the Organic Valley logo above a bowl of coffee being poured, along with USDA Organic and Non-GMO Project Verified seals. The top of the carton has a white plastic screw cap for pouring, and the sides include detailed nutritional facts, product information, and branding. The rear panel highlights the product's organic and pasture-raised qualities, with additional images of other Organic Valley products. The carton is made of laminated paperboard with a plastic cap, designed to contain liquid and keep it fresh.
description: A purple and white Organic Valley Half & Half carton with a white screw cap, detailed branding, and nutritional information panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Organic Valley logo, a bowl of coffee, and product certifications.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional facts panel and barcode.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting organic and pasture-raised claims, with images of other products.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with product care instructions and additional information.
